action.description:
Introduced by Senators Larson, Smith, Roys, Ratcliff, Dassler-Alfheim, Carpenter, Keyeski and Spreitzer; 
cosponsored by Representatives Subeck, Tenorio, Miresse, Sinicki, Clancy, Kirsch, Johnson, Udell, Moore Omokunde, Bare, Billings, Roe, Hong, Arney, Sheehan, Brown, McCarville, Stroud, Palmeri and Stubbs
